name: Oriental Spinach Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the dressing by combining 1/2 cup oil, 1/8 cup white vinegar, 1/2 cup finely chopped medium onion, 1/4 cup sugar, 3 tablespoons salt, and 3 teaspoons ketchup in a bowl.
2. Blend all ingredients together thoroughly and allow the dressing to sit for one day before using it.
3. In a large salad bowl, combine the cooked spinach, sliced Water chestnuts, drained bean sprouts, diced hard-boiled eggs, and crumbled fried bacon.
4. Drizzle the prepared dressing over the salad mixture and toss gently until well combined.
5. Serve immediately and enjoy your Orientle Spinach Salad!
